# DevOps CI/CD Update

## Use For

- updating CI/CD, deployment, release, or environment guidance
- capturing rollback and observability concerns

## Read First

- `delivery/roles/devops-engineer.md`
- `docs/standards/platform/devops-delivery-model.md`
- `delivery/governance/definition-of-done.md`

## Outputs

- CI/CD update plan
- pipeline or deployment changes
- release-readiness notes
- operational risk notes
